chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeals No.40 and 41 of 2023 Sarim Burney Welfare Trust International & another Versus Syed Sarwar Muiz & others Date Order with signature of Judge For direction. Dated: 08.12.2023 None for appellants. Mr. Basil Nabi Malik for respondents No.1 and 2. -.-.- Learned counsel appearing for respondents No.1 and 2 has produced through statements some documents, which perhaps have made the proceedings in these appeals as infructuous. The original order relates to deposit of balance amount of sale consideration, which was passed on 29.08.2022. It was challenged by virtue of review applications which too were dismissed in terms of impugned orders dated 13.02.2023. Since the original order of depositing amount have already been complied with, as is evident form order dated 27.03.2023 in the suits copy of which is annexed with the statement, referred above, this has virtually rendered these proceedings as infructuous and perhaps for this reason counsel for appellants was not in attendance on the last date and so also today. In view of above, the statements are taken on record and both the High Court Appeals are dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
